title: Feather impression tile set
notes: Set of four square tiles (100 mm x 100 mm, 8 mm thick) with feather impressions pressed into the surface. Real feathers (pheasant, crow, pigeon, jay) pressed firmly into soft clay then peeled away, leaving a detailed relief. Border incised around the impression. PVA sealed. Can be mounted as wall art or used as a resting tile for jewellery.
